loginSub: Sign in to view stocks and AI recommendations
registerSub: Create an account to use the investment recommendation system
requireVerify: Registration complete. Please verify your email before login.
invalidDob: You must be at least 18 years old to register
passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordMismatch: Password and confirmation do not match
requiredField: Please fill in all required fields
verifyOk: Email verified successfully. You can now sign in.
searchPlaceholder: Search stock symbol e.g. NVDA, AAPL
marketSentimentTooltip: Internal AI model score is the source of truth. CNN Fear & Greed is shown only as an external benchmark.
cnnReferenceTooltip: Reference only. This external benchmark provides context and does not override the internal AI model.
marketSentimentDivergenceWarning: Warning: Model diverging from market sentiment benchmark.
cnnDivergenceLessBearish: AI model is less bearish than market sentiment.
cnnDivergenceMoreBearish: AI model is more bearish than market sentiment.
cnnDivergenceAligned: AI model is broadly aligned with market sentiment.
momentumTooltip: Measures whether the broad market is trading above or below its medium-term trend.
strengthTooltip: Measures how many major stocks are holding above their 50-day trend.
volatilityTooltip: Measures risk stress using volatility conditions. Higher values mean more risk.
safeHavenTooltip: Measures defensive rotation into safer assets. Higher values mean stronger risk-off demand.
driverWeakMomentumBreadth: Weak momentum and poor breadth indicate downside pressure.
driverMomentumSupportive: Momentum remains supportive for risk assets.
driverVolatilityRiskOff: High volatility confirms a risk-off environment.
driverVolatilityContained: Contained volatility suggests panic is easing.
driverSafeHavenDefensive: Elevated safe-haven demand signals defensive positioning.
driverSafeHavenRiskOn: Low safe-haven demand suggests investors are less defensive.
driverBreadthHolding: Breadth is still holding up better than the headline sentiment suggests.
riskSub: Select your risk level to view model recommendations
newsHeaderSubtitle: Latest market news analyzed by AI.
newsNoData: No market news found for current filters.
newsSentimentSubtitle: AI analyzed news sentiment for this stock.
noSentimentNews: No news found for this sentiment filter.
watchlistSubtitle: Track your favorite stocks in one place.
emptyWatchlist: No stocks in your watchlist yet.
noRecommendedStocks: No recommended stocks available for this risk level yet.
aiPickerSubtitle: Let AI find the best stocks based on market signals.
noPicks: No picks available for this filter set yet.
aiAdvisorGreeting: Hello, I am your AI investment assistant.
sentimentFallback: Using fallback sentiment values (live API unavailable).
sentDesc1: Market sentiment indicates risk-off behavior and defensive positioning.
sentDesc2: Market sentiment remains cautious with selective buying.
sentDesc3: Market sentiment is balanced with no clear dominance.
sentDesc4: Market sentiment indicates strong buying momentum.
sentDesc5: Market sentiment signals euphoric risk-on appetite.
riskNoDataRetry: Risk data is not available yet. Please try again in 1-2 minutes.
riskLoadFail: Failed to load risk data. Please try again.
riskProfileSelectorSubtitle: Choose the risk level that fits your investment behavior.
riskStrategyDynamicNote: Allocation examples are hidden until live portfolio and risk recommendation data are available.
riskLowDesc: Lower volatility with resilient large-cap and defensive assets.
riskLowStrategy2: Allocate toward dividend and broad-market ETF
riskMediumDesc: Balanced mix between growth and stability for long-term performance.
riskMediumStrategy1: Mix growth leaders and high-quality value names
riskHighDesc: Higher upside potential from momentum and thematic growth stocks.
riskHighStrategy1: Focus on high growth sectors and innovation themes
riskHighStrategy2: Use strict stop-loss and position sizing
riskHighStrategy3: Review portfolio weekly for fast changes
portfolioSubtitle: Track your investment performance and allocation in one place.
portfolioValueHint: Current market value of all active holdings.
totalGainLossHint: Unrealized profit or loss versus your weighted average cost.
numberHoldingsHint: Unique tickers after aggregating all lots.
portfolioScoreHint: Combines diversification, concentration risk, and sector balance.
signalStrengthTooltip: Based on momentum, sector strength, and market regime.
portfolioAllocationBalanced: Portfolio allocation looks balanced across current holdings.
deleteAllLotsConfirm: Delete all {{lots}} lots for {{ticker}} ({{shares}} shares total)? This cannot be undone.
outperformanceVsSpyHint: Portfolio return minus SPY return over the same selected time window.
portfolioReturnHint: Total portfolio return over the selected time window.
spyReturnHint: SPY return over the same selected time window.
dailyChangeHint: One-day change in portfolio value versus the previous close.
aggregatedLotsTooltip: This row combines multiple lots. Edit or delete individual lots separately.
aiPortfolioInsightText: Your portfolio is currently weighted toward
portfolioDiversificationHint: Consider diversifying into broader ETF and defensive sectors.
emptyPortfolio: You don't have any investments yet.
aiInsightsSubtitle: AI-generated market insights across signals, sectors, and opportunities.
aiChatPlaceholder: Ask about stocks, markets, or your portfolio...
aiNoAnswer: I could not generate a reliable answer right now.
relevantModelOutputUnavailable: Relevant model output is not available yet.
